---
name: RFC (Request for Comments)
about: Propose a significant architectural or design change
title: "[RFC] "
labels: rfc
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

One-paragraph description of the proposal.

## Motivation

Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?

## Detailed design

Technical description of the proposed change. Include:

- API changes (if any)
- Data model changes (if any)
- New files / modules
- Migration path for existing users

## Drawbacks

Why should we *not* do this? What are the trade-offs?

## Alternatives

What other approaches were considered and why were they rejected?

## Unresolved questions

What parts of the design are still open?

---

> **Process**: RFCs remain open for comment for at least 7 days before a
> decision is made. Breaking changes require RFC approval.
